title: Maximum Number of Groups With Increasing Length
titleCn: 长度递增组的最大数目

testcases.input: usageLimits = [1,2,5] Output: 3 Explanation: In this example, we can use 0 at most once, 1 at most twice, and 2 at most five times. One way of creating the maximum number of groups while satisfying the conditions is: Group 1 contains the number [2]. Group 2 contains the numbers [1,2]. Group 3 contains the numbers [0,1,2]. It can be shown that the maximum number of groups is 3. So, the output is 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: In this example, we can use 0 at most once, 1 at most twice, and 2 at most five times. One way of creating the maximum number of groups while satisfying the conditions is: Group 1 contains the number [2]. Group 2 contains the numbers [1,2]. Group 3 contains the numbers [0,1,2]. It can be shown that the maximum number of groups is 3. So, the output is 3.

It can be shown that the maximum number of groups is 2. So, the output is 2.

One way of creating the maximum number of groups while satisfying the conditions is: Group 1 contains the number [0]. It can be shown that the maximum number of groups is 1. So, the output is 1.
